narrative: I am noticing a medium-severity memory_neo4j_error preventing access to cross-session facts via Mem0, causing authentication failure in my knowledge graph. My agents "desktop", "devops", "financial_analyst", "pim", and "reasoning_methods" lack versioned prompts, creating inconsistency in their operational workflows. These discrepancies contradict my self-improving architecture despite the health status claiming "healthy". I will prioritize diagnosing the neo4j authentication failure and generating versioned prompts for the missing agents.
